Our Services

Our Experience,
Your Success

Specialists in Plant Hire, materials handling, crushing and screening — our team possesses extensive expertise that comes from years of experience in the industry.

Request a Quote →

Crushing & Screening

  • Supply, maintain and operate mobile crushing and screening plants
  • Crushing for mining industry — coal, chrome, platinum, iron ore
  • Crushing for construction — road stone, platform layering, building rubble
01

Materials Handling

  • Load and haul operations
  • Stockpile management in and around plants
  • Re-mining of dumps
  • Train and truck loading
02

Plant Hire

  • Mobile screens — triple / double and scalping screens
  • Mobile crushers — impact, jaw and cone crushers
  • Front-end loaders: 3m³ and 6m³
  • Excavators: 26 – 30 – 40 – 50 Ton
03
Open Cast Mining

About Us

Our Experience,
The Key to Your Success

Specialists in Plant Hire, materials handling, crushing and screening — our team possesses extensive expertise that comes from years of experience in the industry.

How We Got Here
Numzaan is a services company in the construction and mining industry in South Africa.
We were established in the first quarter of 2017.
The innovative team is dedicated to developing the company into a major individual player in the Mining and Construction industry.
The focus is to grow the business into being a household name in the industry.
Our Management team consists of experts from operational, mechanical, safety and financial backgrounds, ensuring targets are achieved in the most cost-effective way.
Numzaan believes in building sustainable relationships with all stakeholders.
As a proudly South African company, it is a set goal to uplift and support local communities through joint ventures, procurement, employment and sustainable development.
The prime objective is to deliver a flawless service, on time, in the safest way possible as per client requirements.
Our Values
🤝

Integrity

We act with honesty, consistency, transparency and truth in all that we do. We pride ourselves in doing what we say we will do.

🌍

Respect

We acknowledge and appreciate the thoughts, opinions and feelings of all people. We treat others with courtesy, equality and fairness. We recognise that our social and cultural differences make us better as a whole.

🚀

Empowerment

We recognise that our people are our most important asset. We endeavour to create an environment where personal development and growth are always supported.

🎯

Mission

To consistently deliver safe and innovative operations and ensure profitable outcomes for our clients, our business and our people.
